title: T-026 — CI deploy script: rules JSON → rule_definitions upsert with V-SET-14 schema check
prompt:
# T-026 — CI deploy script: rules JSON → rule_definitions upsert with V-SET-14 schema check

## Goal
Rules CI deploy migration script.

Runs as Node script in CI. JSON Schema for each rule_type is in `rules/_schemas/<rule_type>.schema.json` (owned by this task or pre-existing CI rules package; T-068 is Email Templates and is not a dependency). Idempotent: re-running with unchanged JSON should result in NO-OP, not version bump.

## Files in scope
- scripts/rules-deploy.ts
- scripts/rules-deploy.test.ts
- rules/.gitkeep

## Acceptance criteria (all must hold)
- V-SET-14 enforced.
- Version bump correct.
- Idempotent on no-change.
- Outbox event emitted.

## Test strategy (RED first)
- RED: 3 cases via fixtures.
- GREEN: implement.

## Risk red lines
- Do not run from app at request time — CI/CD only.
- Do not depend on T-068; it is Email Templates, not rules schema infrastructure.
